The Wave Neo's attached riser places it at the ideal distance from your mouth - so listeners hear more of your voice and less of the clicking of keys. The sound is so clear that listeners feel like they're right there with you, turning a virtual conversation into a real connection. Wherever you talk, Wave Neo fits perfectly from your home laptop to your office Mac, iPad, iPhone and even PlayStation. A Lightning-to-USB adapter may be required for iPhone. The microphone won the VGP Award, a recognition from industry experts and consumers for exceptional performance, design and innovation in the audio-visual industry.

It will enable the study of the landscape, identification of field features and observation of birds and animals. It has a roof-prism design, a compact and ergonomic design allowing comfortable one-handed operation. It offers 8x magnification, 42mm lenses and a field of view of 6.8°. The binoculars provide a clear and sharp image, which is ensured by the 3-element lenses in two groups and the multiple anti-reflective coating used on the optics. Allows adjustment of the interpupillary distance in the range of 53-74 mm. It can also be used by wearers of dioptric glasses, it allows diopter adjustment ±4D. The Levenhuk New Karma Plus binoculars are suitable for medium and long distance observation.                     Key features of Levenhuk New Karma Plus 8×42 binocularsBinocular telescope enables study of the landscape, identification of terrain features and observation of birds and animals

Flexibilní dvojitá kulová hlava umožňuje přesné nastavení úhlu kamery a snadné přizpůsobení kompozice záběru. Držák je kompatibilní s NATO rail systémem a také s Insta360 Dual/Triple Suction Cup Car Mount pro rozšíření možností kreativního natáčení.
